domain: Korean Jeju Haenyeo (sea-women diving collective; each diver holds breath 1-3 min at 20m and surfaces with sharp sumbisori whistle that rapidly expels CO2 and signals surface event; matrilineal community coordinates dive cycles across the bay)
specific_mechanism: HAENYEO-PHASE: multi-expert (or multi-agent) inference pool with coordinated dive-surface phase schedule. (1) Pool of N experts E_1...E_N each capable of intensive K-token block computation. (2) Phase-coherence constraint: at any time only ceil(M/N) experts are 'diving' (computing on K-token block); others 'recovering' (idle / holding context). (3) Each expert on completion emits a shared sumbisori-style signal token to a global synchronization stream; downstream consumers wait for matching signal before proceeding. (4) Cross-expert phase coupling: experts schedule their next dive in coordinated relative phase to maximize pool throughput while preserving collective coherence. (5) Optional matrilineal knowledge transmission: high-performing expert's K-block scheduling profile passed to newly-loaded expert.
llm_application: HAENYEO-PHASE inference scheduling for multi-expert LLM serving: K-token dive-burst computation per expert, sumbisori signal-token synchronization stream, coordinated relative phase across pool, ceil(M/N) divers-at-a-time concurrency constraint. Differs from LLM Scheduling Survey TechRxiv 2025 (covers prefill/decode phase split + MoE expert dispatch but no breath-hold-K-block schedule), Aegaeon SOSP 2025 (shared-memory metadata sync — covers signal stream but not coordinated dive-surface phase), Agent.xpu 2506.24045 (heterogeneous SoC scheduling — covers per-expert dispatch but not relative phase coupling), PerLLM 2405.14636 (edge-cloud personalized — covers distributed pool but not collective sumbisori signal). Differs from R426 HAKA-PHASE-LOCK (RoPE phase reset every K tokens, single-stream not pool), R447 MBUTI-HOCKET-DECODE (modulo-K speculative drafters, single-target verification not pool dive-surface) by EXPLICIT POOL-WIDE COORDINATED DIVE-SURFACE PHASE + SUMBISORI SIGNAL-TOKEN STREAM.
novelty_claim: LLM Scheduling Survey + Aegaeon + Agent.xpu + PerLLM cover expert-pool synchronized inference scheduling space. HAENYEO-PHASE adds (a) explicit dive-recover K-block phase schedule per expert + (b) sumbisori shared signal-token stream + (c) ceil(M/N) divers-at-a-time concurrency rule. Recombination — pool scheduling + signal-stream are mainstream.
